technology-description.space-assembly: Enables orbital assembly of multiple components.
technology-description.space-construction: Unlocks the space drydock facility, as required for the construction of an interstellar vessel.
technology-description.space-casings: Unlocks the ability to build spaceship hull components.
technology-description.protection-fields: Unlocks the ability to build the spaceship protection field component.
technology-description.fusion-reactor: Enables the ability to build the spaceships fusion reactor core.
technology-description.space-thrusters: Enables the ability to build maneuvering thrusters.
technology-description.fuel-cells: Unlocks the ability to construct the spaceship fuel cell component.
technology-description.habitation: Unlocks the ability to build the spaceship habitation component.
technology-description.life-support-systems: Unlocks the ability to build the spaceship life support system.
technology-description.spaceship-command: Unlocks the ability to build the spaceship command center.
technology-description.laser-cannon: Unlocks the ability to build the spaceship laser cannon.
technology-description.ftl-theory-A: Theoretical faster than light travel part A
technology-description.ftl-theory-B: Theoretical faster than light travel part B
technology-description.ftl-theory-C: Theoretical faster than light travel part C
technology-description.ftl-theory-D: Theoretical faster than light travel part D
technology-description.ftl-theory-D1: Theoretical faster than light travel part D1 - productivity bias
technology-description.ftl-theory-D2: Theoretical faster than light travel part D2 - utility bias
technology-description.ftl-propulsion: Unlocks the ability to build the faster than light drive component for the spaceship.
technology-description.exploration-satellite: Unlocks the ability to build Exploration Satellites.
technology-description.space-ai-robots: Unlocks the ability to build AI Robots.
technology-description.space-fluid-tanks: Unlocks the ability to build Spaceship fluid tanks.
technology-description.space-cartography: Unlocks the ability to craft the Space Map.

item-description.assembly-robot: The assembly robot is designed to operate in the rigors of space. Used in the drydock assembly component.
item-description.drydock-assembly: The command module responsible for assembling the various components of the spaceship. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.drydock-structural: The structure of the drydock, used for containing the spaceship while it is being assembled. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.fusion-reactor: The main power source for the spaceship. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.hull-component: Spaceship hull section. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.protection-field: A force field projected from the spaceship. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.space-thruster: The thrusters provide the spaceship with basic below light speed maneuvering capability. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.fuel-cell: The fuel cell for the spaceship's thrusters. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.habitation: The living quarters on the spaceship. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.life-support: The life support system, including oxygen, water and food recycle etc... [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.command: The spaceship command and control center commonly referred to as the bridge. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.laser-cannon: The spaceship laser cannon is for your safety in case there are any nasty biters in space too. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.astrometrics: The astrometrics lab provides the celestial body calculations necessary to enable safe navigation at higher than light speeds. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.ftl-drive: The piece of high tech wizardry that makes journeying amongst the stars possible. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.spaceship-fuel: The actual fuel for the spaceship's thrusters.
item-description.spacex-combinator: Combinator that produces a signal carrying the required components to complete the stage of SpaceX you are currently on, plus a signal representing the stage.
item-description.spacex-combinator-stage: Combinator that produces a signal representing the stage only.
item-description.exploration-satellite: A satellite equipped to go further into space to map your surrounding area. Let's find out where we should go to - and which places to avoid! [Place in rocket silo to launch into space - Produces an Exploration Data Disk]
item-description.exploration-data-disk: A data disk containing data obtained by your Exploration Satellite. Required to craft the Space Map.
item-description.space-ai-robot: An artificial intelligence robot capable to do every task on a spaceship. Your new space companion for the long trip! [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.space-ai-robot-frame: The frame for your personal AI robot companion. Includes an armor, roboport and some defense. Handy!
item-description.space-water-tank: A large water tank. Contains enough water for a decent trip in space. Reminder: Drink enough water! [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.space-oxygen-tank: A large oxygen tank. Contains enough oxygen for a decent trip in space. Keep breathing! [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.space-fuel-tank: A large fuel tank. Contains enough fuel for a decent trip in space. Might be enough to do some sightseeing too! [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]
item-description.space-map: The space map contains all the data you need to plot your route to your destination. [Place in rocket silo to launch into space]

mod-setting-name.SpaceX-no-space-sci: Remove space science from SpaceX technologies
mod-setting-name.SpaceX-no-popup: Suppress Narrative Popups after first completion
mod-setting-name.SpaceX-no-chat-msg: Supress Chat messages after first completion
mod-setting-name.SpaceX-split-combinator: SpaceX split combinator output (required item, stage)

mod-setting-description.SpaceX-research: Research cost multiplier. Defines how many research packs are required for a technology. 0.5 means 50% (half) of the original value. 2 means x2 (double) of the original research cost.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-production: Recipe ingredient cost multiplier. Defines how many ingredient are required to craft an item. 0.5 means 50% (half) of the original value. 2 means x2 (double) of the original ingredients.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-launch-multiplier: Component launch multiplier. Defines how many items must be delivered to complete a stage. 0.5 means 50% (half) of the original value. 2 means x2 (double) of the original items must be delivered.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-ignore-tech-multiplier: SpaceX tech prices are fixed and unaffected by changes to the vanilla game's technology price multiplier used for marathon games.  By default this multiplier is in addition to the SpaceX research cost multiplier, so check this to vary the costs independently (makes marathon SpaceX games easier).
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-space-sci: By default the later SpaceX technologies requires Space Science.  Checking this setting will remove the space science requirement from the SpaceX technologies (makes game easier).
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-nuclear: Replaces all nuclear fuel with rocket fuel in all SpaceX recipes. Also replaces the nuclear reactor with rocket fuel (makes game easier).
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-cheaper-fusion-reactor: The recipe cost of the fusion reactor component is reduced to 40 portable fusion reactors.  This makes them cost 10k processing units (same as in v0.14) rather than 25k processing units that is the standard v0.15 cost (makes game easier).
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-bob: Bob's mods compatibility will not be used in this playthrough if Bob mods are used.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-krastorio: Krastorio2 mods compatibility will not be used in this playthrough if Krastorio2 mods are used.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-pyanodons: Pyanodons mods compatibility will not be used in this playthrough if Pyanodons mods are used.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-ir: Industrial Revolution mods compatibility will not be used in this playthrough if Industrial Revolution mods are used.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-popup: If selected then the narrative popups for the stage completion will be suppressed. (Good for games where you want to launch many FTL craft)
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-auto-continue: This option will automatically continue and reset the SpaceX progress when the FTL space craft has been completed.  Also the popup is suppressed - use in conjucntion with the above selection to remove the popups so you can keep launching multiple FTL spacecraft without manual intervention.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-no-chat-msg: If selected then the chat messages for stage completion will be suppressed. (Good for games where you want to launch many FTL craft)
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-split-combinator: Splits the SpaceX combinator in two: One which outputs only the required item and a new combinator which outputs the special symbol S for the current stage.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-ftl-ramp-up: Gradually ramp up the FTL research with science packs. If disabled, all science packs are required for all FTL technology stages.
mod-setting-description.SpaceX-classic-mode: The classic SpaceX experience. Disables stage 4 and nuclear fuel. Sets the classic research cost for the FTL technologies.
